charge_up.name: Charge-Up
charge_up.description: Must use Primary Action on consecutive turns to charge before using attack.

variants.name: Extended Charge
variants.description: Must charge for two turns before using.

modifiers.name: Triple Charge
modifiers.description: Must charge three turns before using.

modifiers.name: Cascade Failure
modifiers.description: If interrupted during any charge turn, lose ability for rest of combat.

modifiers.name: Escalating Exposure
modifiers.description: Each charge turn reduces your Durability by 5.

variants.name: Rooted While Charging
variants.description: Cannot move between charge-up and release.

modifiers.name: Immobilized
modifiers.description: Cannot move until end of turn after releasing attack.

modifiers.name: Anchored
modifiers.description: If moved from position by any effect, lose charge.

modifiers.name: Melee
modifiers.description: The attack you are making is a melee attack.

variants.name: Concentration
variants.description: Lose charge if you take damage or gain conditions.

modifiers.name: Fragile Concentration
modifiers.description: Concentration breaks if any character moves adjacent to you.

modifiers.name: Cascade Failure
modifiers.description: If concentration broken, you cannot attempt any attack with Concentration for rest of combat.

modifiers.name: Proximity Sensitivity
modifiers.description: Concentration breaks if any character moves within 5 spaces of you.

variants.name: Exposed While Charging
variants.description: Avoidance reduced by 2×Tier while charging.

modifiers.name: Fragile
modifiers.description: Avoidance becomes 0 while charging, all attacks are critical hits.

modifiers.name: Beacon
modifiers.description: All enemies within 30 spaces know your exact location while charging.

modifiers.name: Vulnerable
modifiers.description: Take double damage from all sources while charging.

variants.name: Power Lock
variants.description: Disable specific defensive ability while charging, gain points equal to that ability's cost.

modifiers.name: Extended Lock
modifiers.description: Disabled ability remains unusable until end of next turn.

modifiers.name: Multiple Lock
modifiers.description: Disable second defensive ability, gain its cost in points.

modifiers.name: System Failure
modifiers.description: Requires Concentration - If interrupted, all locked abilities unusable for rest of combat.

variants.name: Focused Charging
variants.description: Must also spend Quick Action on charge and release turns.

modifiers.name: Total Focus
modifiers.description: Must spend Primary Action, Quick Action, and Movement on charge turns.

modifiers.name: Ally Coordination
modifiers.description: Adjacent ally must attack same target you're charging against or charge fails.

modifiers.name: Reaction Delay
modifiers.description: Cannot use Reactions while charging, gain points equal to cost of reaction abilities you have purchased.

reserves.name: Reserves
reserves.description: Can only be used 3 times per combat. Regain all uses after combat ends.

variants.name: Reserves 2
variants.description: Reduce to 2 uses per combat.

modifiers.name: Reserves 1
modifiers.description: Reduce to 1 use per combat.

modifiers.name: Extended Recovery
modifiers.description: Regain uses after full rest instead of after combat, once per day.

variants.name: Volatile Uses
variants.description: Each time you take damage, lose 1 use.

modifiers.name: Condition Trigger
modifiers.description: Each time you gain a condition, lose 1 use.

modifiers.name: Critical Failure
modifiers.description: If you roll a natural 1 on any d20, lose 1 use.

modifiers.name: Life Drain
modifiers.description: If out of uses, and you would lose 1, take 15 damage instead.

variants.name: Shared Pool
variants.description: Multiple special attacks share same use pool, total uses divided among them, +1 use to the pool for each special attack added.

modifiers.name: Reduced Reserves
modifiers.description: Reduce pool by 1 use.

modifiers.name: Pool Drain
modifiers.description: If any attack in pool misses, remove an extra use.

modifiers.name: Cascade Lock
modifiers.description: If any attack in pool misses, no attacks in pool can be used for 1 turn.

variants.name: Steady
variants.description: Cannot use until turn 3 of combat.

modifiers.name: Patient
modifiers.description: Cannot use until turn 5 of combat.

modifiers.name: Unhealthy
modifiers.description: Must be below half HP to use.

modifiers.name: Timid
modifiers.description: Cannot use unless you are at full hit points and are not affected by any conditions.

cooldown.name: Cooldown
cooldown.description: Cannot use again for 1 turn after use.

variants.name: Cooldown 2
variants.description: Cannot use again for 2 turns after use.

modifiers.name: Cooldown 3
modifiers.description: Cannot use again for 3 turns after use.

modifiers.name: Permanent Injury
modifiers.description: Each use of this limit, permanantly increases all cooldown cooldown periods by 1 turn, until you take a full rest.

modifiers.name: Fates
modifiers.description: Roll a d4-1 when the attack is made, the cooldown is extended by the result.

variants.name: Failure Extension
variants.description: If attack misses or fails effect, cooldown period increases by 1 turn.

modifiers.name: Doubling Failure
modifiers.description: If attack misses or fails effect, cooldown period increases by 1 turn.

variants.name: Shared Cooldown
variants.description: Choose 2 other of your special attacks, they can't be used while you are cooling down from this attack.

modifiers.name: Increased Cooldown
modifiers.description: Choose 1 of your more special attacks, they can't be used while you are cooling down from this attack.

modifiers.name: Mass Cooldown
modifiers.description: All of your special attacks cannot be used while you are cooling down from this attack.

variants.name: Death Proximity
variants.description: Cooldown increases by 1 turn for every 25 HP below maximum.

modifiers.name: Trigger Extension
modifiers.description: Taking damage or gaining conditions adds 1 turn to current cooldown.

modifiers.name: Condition Spiral
modifiers.description: Conditions aquired last until the end of your cooldown period.

variants.name: Healthy
variants.description: Your cooldowns don't go down unless you are above 50 HP and not affected by any advanced conditions.

modifiers.name: Pinnacle of Health
modifiers.description: Your cooldowns don't go down unless you are at max HP and not affected by any conditions.

modifiers.name: Timid
modifiers.description: You cannot use this attack unless you are at max HP and not affected by any conditions.

unreliable.name: Unreliable
unreliable.description: Roll d20 before use; if under 5, attack fails and action is wasted.

variants.name: Unreliable 10
variants.description: Must roll 10+ or attack fails.

modifiers.name: Unreliable 15
modifiers.description: Must roll 15+ or attack fails.

modifiers.name: Unreliable 20
modifiers.description: Must roll 20 or attack fails.

modifiers.name: Double Check
modifiers.description: Must make reliability check twice, both must succeed.

variants.name: Stress Breakdown
variants.description: Reliability DC increases by 1 each turn of combat.

modifiers.name: Rapid Degradation
modifiers.description: Reliability DC increases by an additional 1 each turn of combat.

modifiers.name: Health Dependent
modifiers.description: DC increases by 1 for every 10 HP missing.

modifiers.name: Fearful
modifiers.description: DC increases by 5 if an enemy is adjacent to you.

variants.name: Equipment Dependent
variants.description: You have a specific, noticeable and disarmable item, in order to do any attack. There needs to be a reason, you wouldn't always have this item on you. (discuss with GM)

modifiers.name: Fragile Gear
modifiers.description: If you fail the Unreliable roll, the item breaks and won't be fixed until you spend 8 hours, or meet another specified condition (discuss with GM).

modifiers.name: Maintenance
modifiers.description: Equipment breaks if attack fails, requires action to repair.

variants.name: Cascading Failure
variants.description: Each failure increases next reliability DC by 5.

modifiers.name: Spread Effect
modifiers.description: Failed checks increase DC for all your special attacks.

modifiers.name: Critical Cascade
modifiers.description: Failures in combat make ability unusable for rest of session.

variants.name: Attrition
variants.description: When unreliable roll fails, take 15 damage.

modifiers.name: Attrition 2
modifiers.description: When unreliable roll fails, take an additional 15 damage.

modifiers.name: Concussive Kickback
modifiers.description: When unreliable roll fails, gain Stun condition, until the start of your next turn.

modifiers.name: Exhaustive
modifiers.description: When unreliable roll fails, you must spend an effort or fall unconscious.

combo_move.name: Combo Move
combo_move.description: You must have hit an enemy on your last turn.

variants.name: Revenge
variants.description: You must have done damage on inflicted a condition on your last turn.

modifiers.name: Kill History
modifiers.description: You must have defeated an enemy on your last turn.

modifiers.name: Perfect Opening
modifiers.description: You must have critically hit on your last turn.

modifiers.name: Follow-Up
modifiers.description: You must hit the same enemy as you did last turn.

variants.name: Switch Hitter
variants.description: Can only target enemies you have not damaged this combat.

modifiers.name: First Blood
modifiers.description: Can only target enemies no ally has damaged this combat.

modifiers.name: Finishing Move
modifiers.description: Can only target enemies below half max HP.

variants.name: Ally Setup
variants.description: Ally must have hit the same enemy you're about to attack this turn.

modifiers.name: Coordination
modifiers.description: Ally attack must have damaged or inflicted a condition on the same enemy you're about to attack this turn.

modifiers.name: Perfect Teamwork
modifiers.description: Must be a specific Ally, chosen when limit taken.

variants.name: Steady
variants.description: Cannot use until turn 3 of combat.

modifiers.name: Patient
modifiers.description: Cannot use until turn 5 of combat.

variants.name: Escalation
variants.description: Cannot use until an ally is below half HP.

modifiers.name: Desperation
modifiers.description: Cannot use until ally is unconscious.

variants.name: Set Up
variants.description: Must have hit with a specific special attack (chosen when limit taken).

modifiers.name: Solid Set Up
modifiers.description: Must have damaged or inflicted a condition with a specific special attack (chosen when limit taken).

modifiers.name: Perfect Opening
modifiers.description: Must have critically hit with specific special attack.

unhealthy.name: Unhealthy
unhealthy.description: Can only use when below max HP.

variants.name: Unhealthy 2
variants.description: Can only use when at 75 HP or below.

modifiers.name: Unhealthy 3
modifiers.description: Can only use when at 50 HP or below.

modifiers.name: Unhealthy 4
modifiers.description: Can only use when at 25 HP or below.

modifiers.name: Unhealthy 5
modifiers.description: Can only use when at 0 HP or below.

variants.name: Fresh Wound 1
variants.description: Must have taken 15+ damage since the end of your last turn to use.

modifiers.name: Fresh Wound 2
modifiers.description: Must have taken 30+ damage since the end of your last turn to use.

modifiers.name: Continuous Suffering
modifiers.description: Must have taken damage on every turn for the last 3 turns, cannot be caused by Attrition.

modifiers.name: Condition Lock
modifiers.description: Must be afflicted by a condition.

variants.name: Attrition 1
variants.description: Each use costs 15 HP, paid after attack resolves.

modifiers.name: Attrition X
modifiers.description: Each successive use costs additional 15 HP (15, 30, 45, etc.)

modifiers.name: Concussed
modifiers.description: You become stunned until the end of your next turn.

variants.name: Desperation
variants.description: Can only use when an ally is at 25 HP or below.

modifiers.name: Last Resort
modifiers.description: Can only use when 2+ allies are at 25 HP or below.

modifiers.name: Avenger
modifiers.description: Can when an ally is unconscious.

pc.title: Player Character Creation
pc.description: Essential questions for creating your Player Character heir to the Rogue Trader dynasty.

questions.question: What drives your desire to inherit the dynasty's warrant of trade?
options: Legacy Builder - To create something that will outlast you.
Power Seeker - To crave authority and influence.
Duty Bound - To carry on the dynasty's mission.
Survivor - To gain the protection and resources leadership provides.
Idealist - To use the dynasty's power to make the Imperium better.

questions.question: What is your bond with the Rogue Trader, Dame Venecia?
options: The Loyal Retainer - Served from her Knight House days, bound by a blood debt from Cadia.
The Ambitious Partner - Joined her early on, splitting risks and rewards as equals.
The Reluctant Ally - A recent recruit with a hidden agenda, bound by mutual necessity.
The Shared Visionary - You both work toward the same long-term goal for the Imperium.

questions.question: Which aspect of the warrant's mandate do you most want to accomplish?
options: Supply Line Establishment - To maintain supply lines in the most dangerous regions.
Asset Recovery & Cleansing - To cleanse corruption and salvage assets from lost territories.
Technology Acquisition - To acquire Warp-resistant tech and psyker artifacts for the Crusade.
Military Recruitment - To build elite forces from Warp exposure survivors and unsanctioned psykers.

questions.question: What drove you to leave your previous life?
options: Ambition Unfulfilled - Your talents exceeded what your previous station could offer.
Scandal or Disgrace - A failure, betrayal, or forbidden act forced you from your former life.
Loyalty Transferred - You followed someone into exile or discovered a more worthy cause.
Necessity - War, corruption, or upheaval left you no choice but to seek new purpose.

questions.question: How do you handle authority and moral compromises?
options: Respect hierarchy, refuse compromise - You follow Imperial doctrine absolutely.
Question authority, small compromises for greater good - You bend rules when lives hang in the balance.
Challenge authority, pragmatic solutions - You prioritize results over protocol.
Ignore authority unless beneficial - You serve your own interests first.

questions.question: How do others see you?
options: Reliable and trustworthy - Colleagues depend on your word and competence.
Dangerous but useful - Others fear your methods but recognize your effectiveness.
Ambitious and driven - People see your hunger for advancement and achievement.
Mysterious and unpredictable - You keep your thoughts hidden and actions surprise others.

questions.question: Additional Character Background & Biography
questions.placeholder: Describe your character's history, personality, goals, relationships, or any other details that flesh out who they are...

questions.question: Secrets & Notes for the GM
questions.placeholder: Enter any character secrets, hidden agendas, or notes visible only to the Game Master.

npc.title: NPC Creation
npc.description: Each player creates 2 NPCs who serve as key crew members aboard the Eternal Vigil.

questions.question: What is this NPC's connection and role to your character?
options: Blood Bond Specialist - Family or sworn companion with unique skills.
Debt-Bound Right Hand - Life-saver who handles practical operations.
Secret-Sharing Conscience - Dangerous knowledge binds you; keeps you grounded.
Partner Enforcer - Longtime scheme partner who handles dirty work.

questions.question: What is this NPC's personal drive and motivation?
options: The Protector - Motivated by safeguarding something precious.
The Seeker - Pursues something lost, hidden, or forbidden.
The Builder - Works toward creating something lasting.
The Survivor - Driven by need to escape their past or outlive enemies.
The Faithful - Serves a higher cause or promise to someone important.

questions.question: NPC Background & Details
questions.placeholder: Describe this NPC's history, personality, skills, appearance, and relationship dynamics with your character and the crew...

questions.question: Secrets & Notes for the GM
questions.placeholder: Enter any secrets, hidden agendas, or plot hooks for this NPC that only the GM should know...

other.title: Other Character Creation
other.description: For creating additional characters, contacts, or background elements.

questions.question: What type of character is this?
options: Contact/Ally - Someone who provides information or assistance.
Rival/Enemy - An antagonist or competing interest.
Family Member - Related to a PC but not directly involved in operations.
Organization Representative - Speaks for a faction, guild, or institution.
Background Character - Fills out the world but has limited direct involvement.

questions.question: What faction or organization is this character affiliated with?
options: Adeptus Mechanicus - Tech-priests and forge worlds.
Imperial Navy - Fleet officers and void-born crews.
Astra Militarum - Imperial Guard regiments and commanders.
Adeptus Ministorum - Ecclesiarchy priests and missionaries.
Inquisition - Inquisitors, acolytes, and their agents.
Noble Houses - Planetary governors and aristocratic families.
Rogue Trader Dynasties - Other warrant holders and their crews.
Merchant Guilds - Trade consortiums and commercial interests.
Criminal Organizations - Pirates, smugglers, and underworld contacts.
Chaos Cults - Heretical organizations and corrupted individuals.
Eldar - Craftworld, Corsair, or Dark Eldar factions.
Tau Empire - Fire caste, earth caste, or diplomatic corps.
Ork Clans - Warbosses, meks, or surprisingly reasonable greenskins.
Independent/Unaffiliated - Free agents or isolated communities.

questions.question: How does this character relate to the party or dynasty?
questions.placeholder: Describe their connection to the PCs, Dame Venecia, or the dynasty's operations...

questions.question: Character Background & Details
questions.placeholder: Describe this character's history, personality, goals, and role in the story...

questions.question: Secrets & Notes for the GM
questions.placeholder: Enter any secrets, plot hooks, or GM-specific information about this character...

flaw_balanced.name: Balanced
flaw_balanced.description: Must have at least half your Tier rounded down in each Combat Attribute, and can only add your Tier bonus once to each stat across Flaws, Traits, and Primary Actions.

requirements.display: Must maintain minimum combat attribute requirements.

flaw_slow.name: Slow
flaw_slow.description: You cannot select a Movement Archetype.

flaw_combatFocused.name: Combat Focused
flaw_combatFocused.description: You cannot purchase any Utility abilities.

flaw_sickly.name: Sickly
flaw_sickly.description: Your maximum Health Pool is reduced by 30.

flaw_unresponsive.name: Unresponsive
flaw_unresponsive.description: You cannot take Reactions, you do not add your Tier to Initiative, and you cannot benefit from Surprise rounds.

flaw_weak.name: Weak
flaw_weak.description: You get 1 fewer Combat Attribute Point per Tier.

flaw_powerLoss.name: Power Loss
flaw_powerLoss.description: You lose your powers under specific circumstances, determined in discussion with the GM.

flaw_singleTargetSpecialist.name: Single Target Specialist
flaw_singleTargetSpecialist.description: You can only choose Melee OR Ranged attacks, not both.

flaw_equipmentDependent.name: Equipment Dependent
flaw_equipmentDependent.description: Choose a specific item; you lose access to one Archetype benefit without it. The item is noticeable and you can be disarmed of it.

trait_condition_timid.name: Timid
trait_condition_timid.description: At max HP with no conditions

boon_simple_psychic.name: Psychic
boon_simple_psychic.description: All conditions you inflict target Resolve resistance

boon_simple_robot.name: Robot
boon_simple_robot.description: Immune to most Vitality and Resolve conditions, vulnerable to Hacking/Electricity

boon_simple_telekinetic.name: Telekinetic
boon_simple_telekinetic.description: All conditions you inflict target Stability resistance

boon_simple_biohacker.name: Biohacker
boon_simple_biohacker.description: All conditions you inflict target Vitality resistance

boon_simple_utilitarian.name: Utilitarian
boon_simple_utilitarian.description: Gain 10 extra points for Expertise, Features, Senses, and Descriptors

boon_simple_perfectionist.name: Perfectionist
boon_simple_perfectionist.description: Reroll any natural 1s on d20 rolls

action_upgrade_base_attack_quick.name: Quick Base Attack
action_upgrade_base_attack_quick.description: Allows the Base Attack action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_dodge_quick.name: Quick Dodge
action_upgrade_dodge_quick.description: Allows the Dodge action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_brace_quick.name: Quick Brace
action_upgrade_brace_quick.description: Allows the Brace action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_fortify_quick.name: Quick Fortify
action_upgrade_fortify_quick.description: Allows the Fortify action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_aim_quick.name: Quick Aim
action_upgrade_aim_quick.description: Allows the Aim action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_empower_quick.name: Quick Empower
action_upgrade_empower_quick.description: Allows the Empower action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_refine_quick.name: Quick Refine
action_upgrade_refine_quick.description: Allows the Refine action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_assist_quick.name: Quick Assist
action_upgrade_assist_quick.description: Allows the Assist action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_assist_enhanced.name: Enhanced Assist
action_upgrade_assist_enhanced.description: Range increased to 15 spaces and you can target multiple allies up to your Communication or Intelligence score.

action_upgrade_carry_quick.name: Quick Carry
action_upgrade_carry_quick.description: Allows the Carry action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_carry_enhanced.name: Effortless Carry
action_upgrade_carry_enhanced.description: No movement speed penalty. Once you've taken this action once on a turn, you can continue to reuse it for free until the end of this turn.

action_upgrade_protect_quick.name: Quick Protect
action_upgrade_protect_quick.description: Allows the Protect action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_protect_enhanced.name: Guardian
action_upgrade_protect_enhanced.description: You can protect all adjacent allies simultaneously and gain extra reactions equal to half your Tier (rounded up) to use only for the Protect Action.

action_upgrade_use_quick.name: Quick Use
action_upgrade_use_quick.description: Allows the Use action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_hasten_quick.name: Quick Hasten
action_upgrade_hasten_quick.description: Allows the Hasten action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_hide_quick.name: Quick Hide
action_upgrade_hide_quick.description: Allows the Hide action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_prepare_quick.name: Quick Prepare
action_upgrade_prepare_quick.description: Allows the Prepare action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

archetype_movement_swift.name: Swift
archetype_movement_swift.description: Movement speed increased by half your Tier (rounded up). Traverse the battlefield quicker.

archetype_movement_skirmisher.name: Skirmisher
archetype_movement_skirmisher.description: Does not trigger Punish Attacks for moving. +1 space melee attack reach. Maneuver through enemy lines freely.

archetype_movement_behemoth.name: Behemoth
archetype_movement_behemoth.description: Cannot be Grabbed, Moved, knocked Prone, or Stunned. Consistent positioning regardless of enemy interference.

effects.display: Immune to forced movement and stun

archetype_movement_vanguard.name: Vanguard
archetype_movement_vanguard.description: Enemies that start their turn next to you have their movement speed halved until the start of their next turn. As part of a reaction Punish attack, you may move up to your full movement speed towards the target until the end of their turn. Enhanced zone control and battlefield presence.

archetype_attackType_singleTarget.name: Single Target
archetype_attackType_singleTarget.description: Gain Melee AND Ranged attack types for 0p. Specializes in single-target elimination. The most versatile combat approach.

archetype_attackType_aoeSpecialist.name: AOE Specialist
archetype_attackType_aoeSpecialist.description: Gain AOE attack type for 0p. Excels at crowd control and managing multiple targets. Weaker than single target but hits many.

archetype_attackType_directSpecialist.name: Direct Specialist
archetype_attackType_directSpecialist.description: Gain Direct attack type for 0p. Provides reliable effect delivery that cannot be dodged. Perfect for consistent results.

archetype_effectType_damageSpecialist.name: Damage Specialist
archetype_effectType_damageSpecialist.description: Focus purely on dealing damage for maximum potential. Can still use Basic Conditions as separate attacks.

archetype_effectType_hybridSpecialist.name: Hybrid Specialist
archetype_effectType_hybridSpecialist.description: All attacks MUST combine damage and conditions. A versatile but less powerful approach in each aspect.

archetype_effectType_crowdControl.name: Crowd Control
archetype_effectType_crowdControl.description: Free access to 2 Advanced condition effects (chosen at selection), but suffer -Tier to all Damage rolls. Specializes in enemy control and debilitation, a strong team support role.

archetype_uniqueAbility_versatileMaster.name: Versatile Master
archetype_uniqueAbility_versatileMaster.description: Gain 2 Quick Actions per turn. When you select this archetype or advance Tiers, select a number of Primary Actions equal to half your Tier rounded up. You can use each of those Primary Actions as Quick Actions. At Tier 8, gain a third Quick Action.

effects.display: Gain extra Quick Actions and convert Primary Actions

archetype_uniqueAbility_extraordinary.name: Extraordinary
archetype_uniqueAbility_extraordinary.description: Gain an additional (Tier - 2) × 15 points added to your main pool. You can only spend up to (Tier - 2) × 15 points on Flaws or Traits. Ideal for characters specializing in Unique Abilities.

archetype_uniqueAbility_cutAbove.name: Cut Above
archetype_uniqueAbility_cutAbove.description: Gain universal stat bonuses to all core stats: Accuracy, Damage, Conditions, Avoidance, Durability, Resistances, Initiative, and Movement. Tiers 1-4: +1 | Tiers 5-7: +2 | Tiers 8+: +3.

effects.display: +1/+2/+3 to all stats based on Tier

archetype_defensive_stalwart.name: Stalwart
archetype_defensive_stalwart.description: Subtract your Tier from your Avoidance Score. Choose Physical OR Non-Physical damage: you take half damage from that type. Provides specialized damage resistance.

archetype_defensive_fortress.name: Fortress
archetype_defensive_fortress.description: Add your Tier again to Durability. Provides consistent protection against all damage.

archetype_defensive_resilient.name: Resilient
archetype_defensive_resilient.description: Add your Tier to all three Secondary Resistances (Resolve, Stability, Vitality). Makes you exceptionally good at resisting condition effects.

archetype_defensive_immutable.name: Immutable
archetype_defensive_immutable.description: Choose one Secondary Resistance type to gain complete immunity to it. An unshakeable defense against specific attacks.

archetype_defensive_juggernaut.name: Juggernaut
archetype_defensive_juggernaut.description: Increase your maximum Health Pool by 5 × Tier. Provides extra health reserves for attrition warfare.

archetype_specialAttack_normal.name: Normal
archetype_specialAttack_normal.description: Select 3 Specialty Upgrades at half cost. Limits provide Points × (Tier ÷ 6). Allows maximum customization flexibility.

archetype_specialAttack_specialist.name: Specialist
archetype_specialAttack_specialist.description: All limits selected must be applied to all attacks. Limits provide Points × (Tier ÷ 3). A higher return for a restricted playstyle.

requirements.display: All attacks must use the same 3 limits

archetype_specialAttack_paragon.name: Paragon
archetype_specialAttack_paragon.description: Each special attack receives 10 × Tier points. Cannot take Limits. Provides consistent performance without drawbacks.

archetype_specialAttack_oneTrick.name: One Trick
archetype_specialAttack_oneTrick.description: You can only create a single attack, but it gets Tier × 20 points. Cannot take Limits. High-risk, high-reward specialization.

archetype_specialAttack_straightforward.name: Straightforward
archetype_specialAttack_straightforward.description: Choose a single Limit to apply to all attacks. That Limit returns Points × (Tier ÷ 2). A simple but effective approach.

archetype_specialAttack_sharedUses.name: Shared Uses
archetype_specialAttack_sharedUses.description: You have 10 shared uses among abilities, and each attack costs 1-3 uses. Regenerate 1 Use per turn. Gain a Tier × 5 point discount per use cost. Cannot take Limits.

archetype_specialAttack_dualNatured.name: Dual-Natured
archetype_specialAttack_dualNatured.description: You can create two distinct Special Attacks, and each gets 15 × Tier points. Cannot take Limits. A balanced and versatile option.

archetype_specialAttack_basic.name: Basic
archetype_specialAttack_basic.description: Gain Tier × 10 points for base attack improvements only. No special attacks can be created. Good for builds that rely on their base attack.

archetype_utility_specialized.name: Specialized
archetype_utility_specialized.description: Gain double Tier bonus for one chosen core stat. Cannot purchase additional Expertise.

effects.display: Tier x 2 bonus to a chosen core stat

archetype_utility_practical.name: Practical
archetype_utility_practical.description: Select 3 skills to gain proficiency in, each granting a 2 x Tier bonus to checks.

archetype_utility_jackOfAllTrades.name: Jack of All Trades
archetype_utility_jackOfAllTrades.description: Adds Tier bonus to ALL skill checks. Cannot purchase specialized Expertise.

unique_ability_aura.name: Aura
unique_ability_aura.description: A passive field around you affecting enemies or allies. It requires an Action to activate and a Quick Action each turn to maintain.

auraTypes.name: Attack Aura
auraTypes.description: Makes a melee Base Attack against anything entering or ending its turn in the radius. Can only affect the same target once per round. Suffers a -Tier penalty to Accuracy.

auraTypes.name: Obscuring Aura
auraTypes.description: Provides visual cover, prevents sight-based abilities, and attacks through the aura suffer a -Tier penalty to Accuracy. You can see through your Aura and are unpenalized.

auraTypes.name: Bolster Aura
auraTypes.description: Allies in the radius receive the benefit of your Fighting Actions.

upgrades.name: Ranged Origin
upgrades.description: Originates from another point you can see within 15 spaces. If centered on an ally, the point will move with them.

upgrades.name: Additional Effect
upgrades.description: A second aura type is active simultaneously.

upgrades.name: Direct Effect
upgrades.description: The Attack Aura auto-hits without an Accuracy roll, but suffers a -Tier penalty to Damage and Condition rolls.

unique_ability_createWall.name: Create Wall
unique_ability_createWall.description: Create a temporary battlefield structure. It requires an Action to summon and a Quick Action each turn to maintain. The wall has Tier uses per rest.

upgrades.name: Increased Size
upgrades.description: Increase the number of spaces by an additional Tier × 5 per purchase.

upgrades.name: Shapeable
upgrades.description: Freely manipulate the size and shape of the wall.

upgrades.name: Tough
upgrades.description: The wall has 100 HP instead of 50 HP.

unique_ability_shield.name: Shield
unique_ability_shield.description: A personal protective shield. You gain a shield with Tier×3 HP at the start of each turn (not cumulative). The shield's HP is depleted before your regular HP. You cannot boost your Avoidance or Durability outside of Fighting Actions or external sources.

upgrades.name: Increased Shielding
upgrades.description: +Tier×3 max shield HP per purchase (recovery stays the same).

upgrades.name: Quick Recovery
upgrades.description: Recover an additional Tier×3 HP per turn per purchase.

unique_ability_backlash.name: Backlash
unique_ability_backlash.description: An automatic counterattack system. When you are hit by a Melee Attack, you can make a Base Attack against the attacker. You have 2 uses per round, which reset at the start of your turn.

upgrades.name: Distant Response
upgrades.description: Can be triggered by any attack type, and you can respond with a Ranged or Direct Base Attack.

unique_ability_boost.name: Boost
unique_ability_boost.description: A temporary power enhancement. As a Free Action, you can increase your Tier by half (rounded up). The duration is determined by the chosen option below.

upgrades.name: Awakened
upgrades.description: Pick an additional Movement Archetype when purchasing this ability.

upgrades.name: Unstoppable
upgrades.description: Pick an additional Defensive Archetype when purchasing this ability.

unique_ability_baseSummon.name: Base Summon
unique_ability_baseSummon.description: Create a basic summon with stats equal to your Tier, 10 HP (minion), no Special Attacks or Utility abilities. It acts on your initiative.

upgrades.name: Mobile
upgrades.description: The summon gets a Movement archetype.

upgrades.name: Captain
upgrades.description: The summon has 25 HP instead of 10 HP.

unique_ability_invisibility.name: Invisibility
unique_ability_invisibility.description: An advanced concealment ability. You become Invisible and can take the Hide Action even while in the line of sight of enemies. You are unaffected by sight-based abilities.

unique_ability_regeneration.name: Regeneration
unique_ability_regeneration.description: A rapid healing ability. You regain HP at the start of each turn based on your Tier (Tiers 1-4: 20 HP, Tiers 5-6: 30 HP, Tiers 7-8: 40 HP, Tiers 9-10: 50 HP). If unconscious, you wake up once healed to full HP. You cannot boost your Avoidance or Durability outside of Fighting Actions or external sources.

unique_ability_heal.name: Heal
unique_ability_heal.description: Restore health to other characters. Touch a living being to heal them for (5 × Tier) HP. You have 5 uses per rest.

upgrades.name: Increased Charges
upgrades.description: Double the number of charges per purchase.

upgrades.name: Increased Healing
upgrades.description: Double the HP healed per purchase.
